overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a red-haired character in a vest walking along cobblestone paths toward a massive gothic castle (Hogwarts) during golden hour. The character passes landscaped gardens and other students in robes before entering through a large carved wooden door into the interior.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of a massive gothic castle in the distance, backlit by warm golden hour sunlight. The character walks along a curved cobblestone path bordered by manicured hedges and ornate iron lamp posts, gradually approaching the castle walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle exterior walkway with flower beds and student pedestrians

events.description: groups of students in wizard robes become visible walking along the path
path curves left revealing the main castle entrance with large wooden doors

agents.ego_description: walking along the castle wall, passing students and landscaped garden areas with purple flowers

student in dark robe walking away from the camera toward the castle

entered.detail: tall stone castle wall with gothic windows and architectural details
massive wooden entrance door with intricate geometric carvings
wide stone staircase leading up to the main entrance
large ornate planters with white flowers flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the castle wall, passing other students in robes and landscaped gardens with purple flowers. The path curves to reveal the main entrance with its large carved wooden door and stone stairs, while the castle facade now dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle main entrance with winged statues and carved doorway

events.description: character opens the large wooden door and walks into the dark interior corridor

agents.ego_description: ascending the stone stairs and walking through the large wooden door into the castle interior

bronze winged statues flanking the entrance doorway
dark stone corridor visible through the opening door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the imposing main entrance, ascending the stone stairs toward the massive carved wooden door flanked by winged gargoyle statues. The door opens to reveal a dark interior corridor, and the character enters the castle, transitioning from the bright exterior to the shadowy interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sun-drenched approach toward a massive gothic castle, ending with a transition into its shadowy interior. It begins with the character walking along a curved cobblestone path bordered by manicured hedges and iron lamp posts, with the castle backlit by warm golden hour sunlight in the distance. As the character advances, the path curves alongside the castle wall, passing students in robes and gardens of purple flowers while the towering stone facade begins to dominate the frame. The scene then shifts toward the main entrance, where the camera ascends stone stairs flanked by winged gargoyle statues. Finally, the massive carved wooden door opens, drawing the character from the bright exterior light into the darkness of an interior corridor.
